anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The standard declares this exact propagate skill id, and the route-plane mechanism proves only the public navigation and source-coupling boundary named by the standard.
The standard declares this exact propagate skill id, and the route-plane mechanism proves only the public navigation and source-coupling boundary named by the standard.
Skill source mapping names this concept as an applied doctrine boundary.
Skill source mapping names this mechanism as an operational dependency.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: The standard declares this exact propagate skill id, and the route-plane mechanism proves only the public navigation and source-coupling boundary named by the standard.

statement: Microcosm Atlas Route Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Atlas Route Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: A recurring route rule about entry packets, option surfaces, source-coupling refs, receipts, or authority ceilings belongs at the standard level.
The change must propagate through route instances, validators, receipts, generated projections, and anti-claims without asserting source authority.
workflow: Prove the invariant from the standard, entry packet, route-plane organ row, navigation hologram mechanism, source-module manifest, receipt evidence, and generated health.
Update source standards, validators, receipts, generated projections, and focused checks together so the route rule is computed and not asserted.
Leave unsupported source-mutation, private-evidence, provider, release, and whole-system correctness claims as explicit residual pressure.
